deploy.startCommand: mkdir -p /opt/data/memories; cp -n /opt/hermes/docker/memories/MEMORY.md /opt/data/memories/ 2>/dev/null; cp -n /opt/hermes/docker/memories/USER.md /opt/data/memories/ 2>/dev/null; git -C /opt/data/vault pull 2>/dev/null; git clone https://x-access-token:$GITHUB_TOKEN@github.com/dumplingfreak/gia-vault /opt/data/vault 2>/dev/null; hermes gateway run
